message.content:
@startuml
participant Actor as "Caller"
participant Interface as ":RoomTransactionService"
participant Interface as ":RoomTransactionCommand"
participant Interface as ":Nats Streaming"

Actor "Caller" ..> Interface :Create(context, payload)

Interface Validate()

alt ["Data Not Valid"]
    Interface UnprocessableEntity
    end

loop ["For each shift"]
    Interface rt := RoomTransactionModel()
    Interface Create(context, rt)
    Interface uuid
    end

Interface publishTransactionCreated(context, []uuid)
Interface published
Interface created
@enduml
